OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Bornstein for Plaintiff Mercy Housing California, who's representative is present.
Charles Spiegel, Limited Scope Attorney for Defendant Eloy Muniz, who is present.

Settlement conference held. Case settled. Settlement terms are as stated in the signed agreement for premises located at 480 Ellis Street, #341, San Francisco. Please see scanned agreement. The trial date of 10-13-09 is vacated.

JPT: Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
